name: Salazar Resources Limited
description: Salazar Resources Limited is a junior mineral exploration and development company focused on copper-gold assets in Ecuador, holding a 25% carried interest in the El Domo copper-gold project currently under construction and expected to become Ecuador's next producing mine. The company also holds 100% ownership of the Santiago, Pijili, Monja, Tigre, and Tarqui-Quimi exploration projects, consolidated through a 2026 acquisition of Silvercorp Metals' Ecuadorian assets. Salazar is a developer-explorer advancing priority copper-gold porphyry targets toward drilling in 2026.
